hooks.command: python -c "import os, runpy, sys; from pathlib import Path; project_dir = Path(os.environ.get('CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR') or os.getcwd()).resolve(); runner_path = (project_dir / '.claude' / 'scripts' / 'hook_runner.py').resolve(); sys.argv = [str(runner_path), '--script', '.claude/scripts/pre_merge_scope_guard.py']; runpy.run_path(str(runner_path), run_name='__main__')"

python -c "import os, runpy, sys; from pathlib import Path; project_dir = Path(os.environ.get('CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR') or os.getcwd()).resolve(); runner_path = (project_dir / '.claude' / 'scripts' / 'hook_runner.py').resolve(); sys.argv = [str(runner_path), '--script', '.claude/scripts/auto_checkpoint_commit.py']; runpy.run_path(str(runner_path), run_name='__main__')"

python -c "import os, runpy, sys; from pathlib import Path; project_dir = Path(os.environ.get('CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR') or os.getcwd()).resolve(); runner_path = (project_dir / '.claude' / 'scripts' / 'hook_runner.py').resolve(); sys.argv = [str(runner_path), '--script', '.claude/scripts/append_changelog_draft.py']; runpy.run_path(str(runner_path), run_name='__main__')"
